G RO U P 250 Massachusetts Ave NW, Suite 400 | Washington, DC 20001
July 12, 2024
Secretary of the Senate
Office of Public Records
232 Hart Senate Office Building
Washington, DC 20510
Re: Senator John Fetterman
Dear Madame Secretary:
We are writing on behalf of Senator John Fetterman. Enclosed please find Senator Fetterman's
Periodic Disclosure of Financial Transactions (“PTR”) for transactions dated June 6, 2024
and June 21, 2024.
Please do not hesitate to call us should you have further questions. Thank you for your
attention to this matter.
Very truly yours,
Kate Sawyer Keane
Counsel to Senator John Fetterman
